signals.headline: XRP Ledger Quantum-Ready Roadmap Unveiled | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Ledger Quantum-Ready Roadmap Unveiled | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ripple announced a four-phase roadmap on April 20 to make the XRP Ledger quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 (H2 2026) involving deployment and testing of hybrid post-quantum cryptography on Devnet.[2]

signals.headline: XRP Outperforms Market Amid Institutional Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Outperforms Market Amid Institutional Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP gained 6.7% weekly and outpaced Bitcoin and Ethereum, driven by four consecutive days of US ETF inflows totaling $38.86 million, listings on Japan's Rakuten Wallet, and integration of zero-knowledge technology on the XRP Ledger.[2]

signals.headline: Ripple Partners with Kyobo Life for Korea's First Tokenized Bond Settlement | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Partners with Kyobo Life for Korea's First Tokenized Bond Settlement | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 15, Ripple partnered with Kyobo Life to launch Korea's first tokenized government bond settlement through Ripple Custody, establishing stablecoin payment rails for the country's largest life insurer.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Regulatory Clarity Roundtable Held | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Regulatory Clarity Roundtable Held | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC scheduled a roundtable for April 16 to discuss the CLARITY Act, which aims to resolve regulatory uncertainty by determining SEC vs. CFTC oversight of digital assets.[2]
